calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katelyn Wheeler for Maria del Rosario Gonzalez Sieira, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Anthony G. Matricciani for Michael Bykhovsky, Respondent (via Zoom).

The court noted that the respondent agreed to provide receipts, disbursements, and an inventory of trust assets. Ms. Wheeler argued that she has not received sufficient supporting documentation to substantiate the accounting. Mr. Matricciani asserted that he has provided a full probate accounting, which exceeds what was required under the parties' agreement.

Mr. Matricciani argued that the petition should be dismissed as the petitioner lacks standing under Probate Code Section 17200. Ms. Wheeler contended that petitioner has standing as a grantor of the trust because she is personally liable for taxes on trust income and that courts have broad discretion under Probate Code Section 17206 to grant standing to individuals with an economic interest in trust administration. The court requested briefing on the standing issue to determine whether the petitioner has a legal right to pursue additional information.

Ms. Wheeler to file her brief by March 4, 2025. Mr. Matricciani to file his response by March 18, 2025. The matter will be deemed submitted on March 18, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for Maria Gonzalez (petitioner).
Jaime Herren appeared by zoom for Michael Bykhovsky (trustee).
Karyn Stiles (special master) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Herren stated that she was just retained two weeks ago, that her client is not in agreement with Mrs. Stiles and that her client would like to withdraw his stipulation. Mrs. Wheeler stated that Mr. Bykhovsky's former counsel went through the list of special masters, that they agreed to Mrs. Stiles, spoke of Mrs. Stiles' experience and her level of competence, and stated that Mrs. Stiles' hourly rate is reasonable. Mrs. Herren stated that she does not wish to delay this, but she needs to get up to speed with the accounting. The court appoints Mrs. Stiles as special master over Mr. Bykhovsky's objections. Mrs. Wheeler asked the court to leave the petition on calendar stating that based on the history, they may have some conflict, raised the issue of mediation, and raised the issue of this probably being better suited in family court because they are ex-spouses. The court denied Mrs. Wheeler's request for an order that no trust assets be used to pay for attorney's fees and stated that she needs to file an appropriate petition. The Petition to Compel Accounting is continued to October 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status conference statement regarding Mrs. Stiles and mediation is to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Continued To Jul-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Ruth Koller Burke appeared by zoom for Michael Bykhovsky (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding the possibility of having a special master appointed, it being helpful to have a list of items as some of the requests are quite broad, the expense of a special master having to come out of the trust, etc. The parties are to meet and confer by June 28, 2024. They are to provide a recommendation of a special master by July 10, 2024. If they cannot agree on one person, each party is to provide a list of three names and the court will select someone. Said lists are to be e-filed as a status report. The Petition to Compel Accounting is continued to July 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for Maria Gonzalez Sieira.
Ruth Burke appeared by zoom for Michael Bykhovsky (respondent).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the issue of whether or not all of the requested documents have been provided. Discussion was also held regarding the form of communication or lack thereof that has taken place between counsel, a list of the wanted documents not having been provided, issues being raised that are outside of this petition, concern about the trustee not paying the mortgage, no supporting documents having been provided with respect to the accounting, the trust not being administered pursuant to the terms of the trust, the accounting having revealed numerous breaches, etc. The court raised the issue of getting a special master to assist the parties. The court ordered counsel to meet and confer by telephone, in person or by zoom, but not by e-mail and to communicate exactly what is being requested and provide responses to the requests by May 29, 2024. A joint status report as to the result of the meet and confer is to be filed by June 5, 2024. The Petition to Compel Accounting is continued to June 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Murphy. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for Maria Siera (petitioner).
Ruth Burke appeared by zoom for Michael Bykhovsky.

Ms. Burke stated that she will meet and confer and get the additional document. Petition to compel accounting is continued to May 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared via zoom for Maria Del Rosario Sieira (petitioner).
Jennifer Herlihy appeared via zoom for Michael Byhovsky (respondent).

Ms. Wheeler stated that she has not received the accounting for seven years but did receive for four years, and that she is requesting accounting for the seven-year period. Ms. Herlihy stated that she will need more time to go back another three years to provide the full seven years. Petition to compel accounting is continued to March 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by March 06, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

KATELYN M. WHEELER, Esq., for MARIA DEL ROSARIO GONZALEZ SIEIRA, Petitioner.

Morgan Durham, Esq., for Michael Bykhovsky, Trustee.

Counsel offers updates on their respective positions re the pending accounting. The court orders Trustee to provide Petitioner an accounting by a date to be determined by the court or sanctions in the amount of $250 will be considered pursuant to CCP 177.5.

The matter is continued to Dec-13-2023 9:00 am in Dept. 204. An Accounting is to be provided as ordered above by Nov-29-2023.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Continued To Oct-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathryn Wheeler, Esq., counsel for Maria del Rosario Gonzalez Sieira; (appearing by video conference)

Ms. Wheeler reports that the parties have prepared a Stipulation and Order essentially resolving the matter before the Court. The Court instructs counsel to revise the pleading as a Stipulation only as no Order is needed in the Court's opinion.

The Court continues the matter to October 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 with the understanding - or hope - that the hearing will be obviated with the filing of the Stipulation and performance of the same.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Choi. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
